title: Fix TranslationProvider context initialization error

requirements.text: Wrap the entire application root with TranslationProvider in frontend/src/main.tsx so that useTranslation hook can access the translation context throughout the component tree

quotes: the whole website says "Something went wrong! Hide Error useTranslationContext must be used within TranslationProvider"

acceptanceCriteria: TranslationProvider wraps the App component in main.tsx
The application loads without the TranslationProvider error
All pages and components can access translation functions without errors

constraints: Do not modify frontend/src/main.tsx structure beyond adding the TranslationProvider wrapper
Preserve existing QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers
